``` sql
UPDATE cf_reserve_rate_dt
SET    product_group = 'BASE'
WHERE  cf_reserve_rate_hd_id NOT IN (1536, 1541);
```

Step 2
``` sql
UPDATE cf_reserve_rate_dt
SET    product_group = 'RIDER' 
WHERE  cf_reserve_rate_hd_id IN (1536, 1541);
```
